title: Tesla (TSLA) Comprehensive 6-Month Analysis Report
author: tickeron_community
selftext: After a thorough analysis of Tesla, Inc. ([TSLA](https://tickeron.com/ticker/TSLA/)) over the past 6 months, including price data, technical indicators, financial metrics, competitor comparisons, and online sentiment, I conclude a **bearish outlook** for the stock with a **6-month price target of $240**, representing a potential 17% decline from the current price of approximately $288 (as of May 6, 2025).
